solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public char repeatedCharacter(String s) {
        boolean[] seen = new boolean[26];
        for (char c : s.toCharArray()) {
            if (seen[c - 'a']) return c;
            seen[c - 'a'] = true;
        }
        return ' '; // This line is unreachable due to problem constraints
    }
}
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses a boolean array to track which letters have been seen once. It iterates through the string once, checking for the first letter that has already been marked as seen, which indicates the second occurrence. The key strength is its linear time and constant space efficiency.
